mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, TO_CHAR(a.VALID_DATE_FROM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as VALID_DATE_FROM, TO_CHAR(a.VALID_DATE_TO, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as VALID_DATE_TO, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM AR_STATISTIC_DATE a LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON a.STAT_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON a.STAT_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON a.STAT_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON a.STAT_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko'
AND ( a.STAT_NO LIKE '%' || #{statNo} || '%' OR gvi.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{statNo} || '%' OR gen.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{statNo} || '%' OR gzh.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{statNo} || '%' OR gko.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{statNo} || '%' )
ORDER BY a.ORDERNO, a.STAT_NO
SELECT a.*, TO_CHAR(a.VALID_DATE_FROM, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as VALID_DATE_FROM, TO_CHAR(a.VALID_DATE_TO, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as VALID_DATE_TO FROM AR_STATISTIC_DATE a WHERE a.STAT_NO = #{statNo}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO AR_STATISTIC_DATE ( STAT_NO, BEGIN_MONTH_OFFSET, END_MONTH_OFFSET, VALID_DATE_FROM, VALID_DATE_TO, START_DAY, END_DAY, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO ) VALUES ( #{statNo}, #{beginMonthOffset, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{endMonthOffset, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
TO_DATE(#{validDateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL ,
TO_DATE(#{validDateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') NULL , #{startDay, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{endDay, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SYSDATE, #{createdBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{updatedBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE AR_STATISTIC_DATE
BEGIN_MONTH_OFFSET = #{beginMonthOffset, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
END_MONTH_OFFSET = #{endMonthOffset, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
VALID_DATE_FROM = TO_DATE(#{validDateFrom}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
VALID_DATE_FROM = NULL,
VALID_DATE_TO = TO_DATE(#{validDateTo}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
VALID_DATE_TO = NULL,
START_DAY = #{startDay, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
END_DAY = #{endDay, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ACTIVITY = #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
ORDERNO = #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC},
UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = #{updatedBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
WHERE STAT_NO = #{statNo}
